pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 25-35, INSERT statement creates patient with first_name='Oliver', last_name='Export'

setup_task.sh lines 58-67, INSERT into dxresearch with dx_research_code='493'. Verified via web search that ICD-9 code 493 is the standard coding for Asthma (https://www.icd9data.com/2015/Volume1/460-519/490-496/493/493.htm)
setup_task.sh lines 46-56, INSERT into allergies table with description='Penicillin'
setup_task.sh line 31, date_of_birth='1980-05-15' in INSERT statement

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic test data created programmatically. Patient Oliver Export (DOB: 1980-05-15) is created via SQL INSERT in setup_task.sh with ICD-9 code 493 (Asthma) as the disease/problem and Penicillin as the documented allergy. The expected output is a CPP (Cumulative Patient Profile) PDF saved to /home/ga/Downloads containing the patient name, Asthma problem, and Penicillin allergy. All metadata claims (patient_name, expected_problem, expected_allergy, download_dir) are verified and match the setup scripts.
